title: Quran, Sura 100: Al-Adiyat
description: Sura 100 (Al-Adiyat: The Chargers) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 100 (Al-Adiyat: The Chargers) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: By the racers, panting, and the producers of sparks when striking, and the chargers at dawn, stirring up thereby clouds of dust.
